issues.description: effectText describes a replacement effect that prevents removal, but effects[] is empty. Must define: trigger=OnKO (or card removal context), condition checking for green Character on board (not Tashigi), action to Rest this character instead of being removed.
Missing trigger. Text indicates 'would be removed...by your opponent's effect' — this is a replacement/prevention mechanic, typically modeled as OnKO or Counter. Trigger required.
Missing condition: must verify player has a green Character on field (HasCardOnBoard with type filter) AND that Character is not named Tashigi.
Missing action: Rest this Character (Rest action type). The effect allows resting this Character as a replacement for removal.
